text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, following a training session with
Tosen Jordan...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Next up, I'll run along the river and arrive
at the dorm five minutes before curfew.
Excellent—everything's going according to plan
today.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You're running in that area? Isn't it gonna be super crowded? That spot's been trending on Umasta for the chill night scenes.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Really?! I was not aware of those details.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There's only two minutes until I leave. I have no
time to alter the route... Maybe I could shorten
the distance? Ah, but then—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, want me to tell you a better route? It's closer
than the river.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Lemme go with you—I wanted to drop by the
convenience store down there anyway.
choice_data_list: Any more running for you would be overkill.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Cool, then let's roll. It's dark, so watch your step.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Oh, please wait! First, I need to calculate the
distance and time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Tosen Jordan ends up running much more
than usual.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Come ooon! It'll be fine! Don't be such a buzzkill!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Running too much certainly wouldn't be good. I
believe that is an accurate judgment.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If you would just give me directions, I'd be very
grateful.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
All right, fine... Give me a call if you get lost. I'll
be up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan tells Eishin Flash the shorter route
and sees her off before heading back to the
dorm.
